The Court granted the Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem and the Petition For Instructions, (signing the orders for the same in open court).

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Oct-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Capron appearing for respondent/co-trustee. Daniel Allen appearing for petitioner/co-trustee Donna Sing Gonzales. Denise Choy, beneficiary is in court. Court felt Pro Bono Mediation will be useful. Mr. Caprom agreed. Mr. Allen requested for a ruling on the sub-trust funding issue. He also raised the conflict issue with Mr. Capron represented Unisource. Court is not making any ruling at this time. Court is referring this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 10/10. Matter is continued to 10/17 for status. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

MINI MINUTES: Gerald Holmes appearing for petitioner. Declaratory relief is granted. Counsel to file the petition for instruction and set it for hearing. Counsel will prepare an order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
